relations.subject: Blue-headed vireo
relations.evidence: Native to North America, the blue-headed vireo enjoys a large breeding range that extends over an immense area of Canada and northern United States

relations.subject: Blue-headed vireo
relations.evidence: alticola migrates across a shorter distance to an area that extends from southeastern Virginia to Texas. Blue-headed vireos prefer to breed in cool temperate forests, which in the southern part of its breeding range are found at higher elevations
relations.object_summary: 温带岛屿或山地森林生态系统。

relations.subject: Blue-headed vireo
relations.evidence: They are also found in coastal and flood plain swamps and low shrubby thickets. Year round, even during the breeding season, population density is somewhat low and spread out
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
